top.title: Ultimatums, diplomacy and a trip to Graceland as Trump eyes a deal with Iran
top.summary: America may be a nation at war, but the president's activities have been a mix of diplomacy and diversions - with the occasional swing toward the surreal.

top.title: 'Like the plane got cut in half': LaGuardia crash that killed two pilots now under investigation
top.summary: In the aftermath of the collision of Air Canada flight AC8646 with a fire truck in New York, US transportation chief Sean Duffy emphasized that seat belts helped save lives

top.title: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
top.summary: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.

top.title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
top.summary: There are almost no major brands of internet routers that are manufactured in the US.

top.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
top.summary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.
